message:
test(e2e): harden install flow spec with scoped selectors and curl-based assertions

- Wait for framer-motion card animation before interacting with install dialog
- Scope install button selector to dialog context to avoid ambiguous matches
- Update clipboard assertion to validate curl-based install command format
- Increase interaction timeouts for animation-heavy UI transitions

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
